features.name: Authentication
features.description: User authentication system with login, signup, and onboarding flows. Supports username-based authentication with Firebase/Supabase integration.

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard for teachers showing overview of their sessions, students, and activities.

features.name: Teacher Sessions Management
features.description: Page for teachers to view, create, and manage their teaching sessions with students.

features.name: Teacher Students Management
features.description: Page for teachers to manage their students, view progress, and assign homework.

features.name: Teacher Homework
features.description: Page for teachers to create and manage homework assignments for students.

features.name: Teacher Profile Settings
features.description: Profile and settings page for teachers to manage their account information.

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard for students showing their learning progress, upcoming sessions, and homework.

features.name: Student Sessions
features.description: Page for students to view their scheduled sessions with teachers.

features.name: Student Learning
features.description: Interactive learning page for students to study Quran.

features.name: Student Homework
features.description: Page for students to view and complete their assigned homework.

features.name: Student Profile Settings
features.description: Profile and settings page for students to manage their account information.

features.name: Messaging System
features.description: Messaging functionality for communication between teachers and students.

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: Toast notification system for displaying feedback messages to users.

features.name: Teachers Data Hook
features.description: Custom hook for fetching and managing teachers data.

features.name: Layout Components
features.description: Shared layout components used across the application.

features.name: Firebase Integration
features.description: Firebase configuration and initialization for authentication and database.

features.name: App Router
features.description: Main application component with routing logic for different user roles.
